tweets.full_text:
Someone just patched GIMP to look and feel exactly like Photoshop.

It's called PhotoGIMP. Same tool layout, same keyboard shortcuts, same workflow. Drop the patch in and GIMP becomes Photoshop, minus the $263/year subscription.

100% Open Source. https://t.co/gs3N91tenY
tweets.summary: 开源项目PhotoGIMP将GIMP改造成Photoshop界面，保留所有快捷键和工作流，省去$263/年订阅费。100%开源免费。

tweets.full_text:
Japan: longest life expectancy on the planet (around 85 years).

Plant-based advocates: "See? Rice and vegetables!"

Japan's actual diet:

Seafood: by far the most consumed animal protein, around 45-50kg per capita annually
Pork: the most consumed land meat
